quantum_casing.title: Craft Quantum Casings (Create Teleporters step 3 — structural housing from Quantum Fluid + Create metals)

advanced_component.title: Craft Advanced Quantum Components (Create Teleporters step 4 — combines Quantum Casing + Precision Mechanisms)

subtitle.text: The casing holds the quantum fluid in a stable state. Without structure, the fluid dissipates.

description: Quantum Fluid combined with Create metals (brass or refined) in a mold.
The casing is the structural component — it contains the quantum properties
and makes them usable in a physical device.
4 casings minimum for a single teleporter installation.
Quantum Casing + Create Precision Mechanisms combined.
Precision Mechanisms require the Create sequence: Andesite Alloy → Brass → Precision.
If your Create automation is running, this step is fast.
If not, craft the Precision Mechanisms manually (gear + shaft + rotor recipe).
You are building a device that instantaneously moves matter across space.
The precision component is not optional.
Create's accuracy is what makes this possible.
